name: Kew Media Group Inc.
description: Kew Media Group Inc. was a content company that operated globally, focusing on the production and distribution of a diverse range of television and digital media content. The company managed two primary segments: Production and Distribution, creating and licensing genres including drama, comedy, documentary, crime, home improvement, and paranormal programming. Headquartered in Toronto, Canada, the company grew through various acquisitions of production houses before facing financial difficulties and entering insolvency proceedings in early 2020, leading to the cessation of its operations.
